creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
Most bustage didn't have any consumers, so I've just decimated it and landed the update in order to avoid the bucket growing with more from new ports or updates.

- editors/openoffice* will be fixed soon, see bug 227553
- graphics/pcl-pointclouds see upstream bug in BROKEN
- games/flightgear-terragear ignored as 10.3 will be EOL soon (10.4 is OK)
